# Geometric units M=1. Columns are key = value (value = N[.,30] InputForm).
# Conventions: x = cos(inclination); E,L,Q constants of motion (Carter Q with Schmidt/KerrGeodesics convention);
#   Upsilon_{t,r,theta,phi} = Mino-time fundamental frequencies; Omega_{r,theta,phi} = Boyer-Lindquist frequencies.
#   r1>=r2>=r3>=r4 radial roots (r1=apastron p/(1-e), r2=periastron p/(1+e)); {zp,zm} polar roots.
